
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Coconut Macaroons.
    Summary: Nathan & Thorton,

Ok so your father knows that it is the holiday season (any holiday to be honest) when I break out these cookies. They are achingly sweet and gluten free. You can lessen the sugar content but where is the fun in that?! I love you both dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 4  egg whites, 4 cups shredded coconut, sweetened, 1 tsp almond extract, 0.5 cup granulated sugar, 0.125 tsp cream of tartar, dash  salt
